---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Université de Montréal

**Lecturer**

- ECN 1910 — Introduction to Economics (undergraduate) — Fall 2025

---

**Teaching Assistant**

- ECN 1050 — Introduction to Macroeconomics (undergraduate) — Winter 2024, Winter 2026
- ECN 1070 — Mathematics for Economics I (undergraduate) — Winter 2025, Fall 2025
- ECN 1075 — Mathematics for Economics II (undergraduate) — Summer 2024
- ECN 1700 — Economics and Globalization (undergraduate) — Summer 2024

---

## Université de Kara

**Lecturer**

- Applied Statistical Computing: Stata, R, and Python (undergraduate) — 2021–2023
